bill.description: Bill's Bid Sheet - Detailed equivalent inch (EI) based labor system

material_factor_groups.1: Low Chrome (0.5% Moly, 0.5-2% Chrome - P1, P2, P12, P11, P3)
material_factor_groups.2: Medium Chrome (2-6% Chrome - P3b, P22, P21, P5)
material_factor_groups.6: Low Temp CS (A333 Gr.1, Gr.4, Gr.9)
material_factor_groups.8: Exotic SS (321, 347, Alloy 20, Monel, Inconel, Incoloy, Carpenter 20)

pipe_location_factors.description: Multiplied against pipe handling MH/LF. Lower = easier install location.

elevation_factors.description: Multiplied against labor hours for work at height.

support_labor_units.description: MH per support for field installation

support_material_prices.description: Unit material price per support type

welding_rod_consumption.description: Welding rods consumed per LI (linear inch) of welding
welding_rod_consumption.formula: Total LI of field welding / 6 = lbs of welding rod

groups.8: Exotic SS (321, 347, Alloy 20, Monel, Inconel, Incoloy)

alloy_factors.description: Multiply CS labor hours by these factors for alloy materials. E.g., SS welding = CS welding hours × 2.0

steel_mh_units.description: Structural steel base rate is 12 MH/ton for erection

hydrotesting.description: Field hydrotesting = pipe LF × hydro factor. Factor of 0.1 means 10% of a base MH/LF rate.

mh_per_ei.description: Multiply EI value by these rates to get manhours. CS=Carbon Steel, SS=Stainless Steel. FFW=fit-up field weld (slightly higher than standard field).

xray_factors.description: X-Ray cost per shot, multiplied by % of welds requiring x-ray

justin.description: Justin's Bid Program - Factor-based quick estimating

Exchanger.description: Heat exchanger setting - MH per unit

Contingency.description: Contingency - 15% of total hours, applied as multiplier

Supervision.description: Supervision - 60 hours per week of project duration

cost_params.description: Justin's bid program cost parameters. Labor rate and per diem are per hour. Markups are decimals (0.15 = 15%). Contingency is applied to total labor hours.
